title: InvestorNewsBreaks - Pinterest Inc. (NYSE: PINS) Q2 2024 Earnings Preview
text: Pinterest was preparing to report Q2 2024 earnings with analysts expecting the company to continue its growth trajectory. Wall Street anticipated revenue in the $848-850 million range with earnings per share around $0.38. The company had been showing positive momentum in its advertising business, particularly with lower-funnel performance advertising solutions. Key metrics to watch included monthly active users growth, average revenue per user trends, and advertiser adoption of the company's Performance+ product. Analysts were particularly interested in Pinterest's ability to maintain user growth momentum and expand margins through operational leverage. The company faced some headwinds from softness in certain advertising categories, but investors remained optimistic about long-term growth prospects driven by AI investments and international expansion. Prior quarterly results had shown the company beating on revenue and EPS metrics, setting up positive expectations for Q2.
